para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:6px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Ensure sufficient clearance along the entire transportation route prior to transportation and installation.

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: The Machine body is the largest item during transportation, requirements for all other peripheral devices and loose items will comply, unless specifically indicated in the table below.

para.style: text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: If transporting by crane, ensure sufficient clearance from the crane to the item height, including hoisting attachment indicated below.

para.style: text-align:justify; margin-bottom:6px; line-height:1.18;
para.text: If transporting by forklift, ensure sufficient space to maneuver the forklift for positioning the machine, as well as to extract the forks from the machine.
Table <%HMTABLECOUNTER2=1%>.<%HMTABLECOUNTER=1%> Machine Body Dimensions During Transportation

table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:6px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:12px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:336px left ;

text-align:justify; text-indent:0px; margin-top:6px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:8px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.18; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Refer to the following figures of machine general view and layout to ensure sufficient installation space is available at the installation location.

para.style: text-align:justify; line-height:1.18;
para.text: The maintenance areas shown in the Machine Layout is the maintenance space required after

para.style: text-align:center; line-height:1.18; page-break-before:always;
text-align:center; margin-bottom:10px;

para.text: Figure <%HMFIGURECOUNTER2=1%>.<%HMFIGURECOUNTER=1%> Standard Machine General Views & Dimensions 1

text-align:center; margin-bottom:10px;
